replies.author: AmbitiousHealth8340
replies.body:
Yeah a few working class retail traders getting out of poverty would affect his edge by maybe 1 cent throughout his entire career. 
I get surprised at how selfish some people are in this space, I had figured we are all just poor people trapped in the closing caste system of America and just want to own a house and have a family like every janitor did in 1970…
Guess I forget how people are

replies.author: AmbitiousHealth8340
replies.body: That’s if it even really works

replies.author: Beautiful-Ad6512
replies.body:
Exactly. The whole point of trading communities is to grow together, not gatekeep tools that could help others escape the same struggles we all face.
Flexing with an unreleased indicator isn’t skill—it’s ego. Real traders share knowledge because they understand the grind it takes to reach consistency.

replies.author: AmbitiousHealth8340
replies.body:
I agree I just found a very simple strategy with a good win rate and first thing I did was spam it to all my friends. All of them fudded and thought it was too good to be true though lol
But yeah, worrying about losing a couple cents in your entire career because a few dozen on Reddit tried it too is next level selfish, but we shouldn’t be surprised. Not all of us are poor people trying to own a house and have a family. Some people here are upper middle class who made it but want a lambo and mansion.
Dm me if you want the strategy tho. No crypto bullshit or scams I’ll just give it to you.
It’s just a few pages long so I don’t want to post it here

replies.body: your s legend

replies.author: AmbitiousHealth8340
replies.body:
I’m sure there’s also people both rich and poor who do it as a brain teaser type thing too
I started for fun, but as I got snubbed for a promotion and wasn’t able to attend school due to a paycut that placed me in a situation where I was only making money due to investments (too stressful to balance school and that) I locked in and now see it as my only way to ever have a house and stay at home wife.
